title: Zs 3D Spears
body:
![3D Spears For Your Vanilla Game To Make It Better](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5841ad7489b34cc04e8b5449f78ba53a47539c9_0.webp)


The 3D Spears texture pack replaces standard weapon visuals with fully modeled 3D spear designs, adding depth and realism to combat. Each spear features clean modeling and sharp details, creating a more immersive and powerful look while staying clear and readable during gameplay.

Designed to blend smoothly with Minecraft’s vanilla style, these 3D spears enhance both PvP and survival experiences without affecting performance. The pack is ideal for players who want unique, high-quality weapon visuals while keeping gameplay balanced and recognizable.

Features

Fully modeled 3D spear designs

Enhanced depth and realistic detailing

Clear and recognizable in PvP combat

Vanilla-friendly visual style

Performance-optimized models

Suitable for survival, PvP, and multiplayer servers
